name_en: ❤️Large! Sand Stripes. Large is cool😎, premium, and unique. No height requirement; even around 160cm looks super good. The vibe is instantly elevated! Counter-new fabric (100% cotton) paired with original cowhide. All edges are wrapped in original cowhide✔️. We refuse faux leather❌. Support comparison!!
